name: delete_noc_interface
full_help:
delete_noc_interface

Description: 
Delete NOC Interface.

Syntax: 
delete_noc_interface  [-quiet] [-verbose] <interface>

Usage: 
  Name         Description
  ------------------------
  [-quiet]     Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]   Suspend message limits during command execution
  <interface>  NOC Interface to delete.

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
